历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 482, 483, 484, 560, and 516 respectively; rankings were highly stable from 2021 to 2023 (482–484), significantly dropped to 560 in 2024 (a drop of about 76 places), and rebounded to 516 in 2025 (an advance of about 44 places), showing an overall fluctuating downward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 516; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 33 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 22 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 21, a slight reduction of about 4.5% compared to 22 in 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (stable at 17–19 in recent years), belonging to the top national universities (Top 20), with strong and sustained appeal for admissions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly related to teacher ethics and style public opinion; the 2025 reputation is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity ranks 44th overall (relatively hot), with popularity declining in recent years; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 9 A+ disciplines and 15 A- and above; Computer Science and Technology is rated A, Statistics A+, Physics A-, which strongly attracts Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Statistics continue to gain social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing Gaokao is approximately 209,000 (estimated Physics Category about 133,760), a slight decrease from 139,478 in 2025, easing competition slightly; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in Chongqing; its enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing has been around 21–34 in recent years, with the 2026 plan of 21 being the lowest in recent years, indicating a relatively small enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating downward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the slight decrease in local Physics Category candidates, and the stable top-tier appeal of the university, based on the 2025 baseline of 516, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 502, with a range of 445–559.

- Statistics (Data Scientist Plan).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (445–559), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 445), you can focus on hitting popular majors like Computer Science Turing Class, Artificial Intelligence, and Statistics; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 550), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and carefully consider Tier 1 majors.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (stable at 17–19 in recent years), belonging to the top national universities (Top 20), with strong and sustained attractiveness for applications; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly related to teacher ethics and style public opinion; the 2025 reputation is neutral/mixed (with both positive disciplinary honors and negative incidents); Douyin heat total ranking is 44th (relatively hot), once ranked 9th in 2023 (very hot), with heat declining in recent years; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 9 A+ disciplines (Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Law, Sociology, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Statistics, Business Administration, Marxist Theory), 4 A disciplines, and 2 A- disciplines, with a total of 15 A- and above, making it a national top university in humanities and social sciences.
